bead.title: Add cost-per-closed-bead metric to ddx agent metrics
bead.description: Add a ddx agent metrics cost-efficiency subcommand that computes the total cost to close each bead, including all failed escalation attempts. This is the north-star metric for the epic — you cannot optimize what you cannot measure. The data already exists in .ddx/executions/*/result.json (bead_id, outcome, cost_usd); this aggregates it per bead across all attempts.
bead.acceptance:
1. ddx agent metrics cost-efficiency outputs a table: bead_id, total_attempts, total_cost_usd, successful_cost_usd, wasted_cost_usd (failed attempts), final_tier, final_harness.
2. --json flag emits structured JSON.
3. --last N limits to beads with at least one attempt in the most recent N executions.
4. Wasted cost is the sum of cost_usd for attempts where outcome != task_succeeded on the same bead_id.
5. Unit test with synthetic result.json files covering: single-attempt success, escalation (2 failures + 1 success), all-failure bead.
6. cd cli && go test -run TestCostEfficiency ./cmd && go build .
